title: Every Ratio. One Upload. 28 Etsy Print Sizes Across 5 Ratio Packs
description: Every ratio Etsy buyers search for — in one upload. 2:3 Portrait: 4×6, 6×9, 8×12, 10×15, 12×18, 16×24, 20×30. 3:4 Classic: 6×8, 9×12, 12×16, 15×20, 18×24. 4:5 Traditional: 8×10, 12×15, 16×20, 20×25, 24×30. ISO A-series: A5, A4, A3, A2, A1. Extras: 5×7, 8.5×11, 11×14, 11×17, 13×19, 20×24. 300 DPI. Etsy-ready ZIP. No Photoshop.
